summary: Dataviz Comparison Split component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的左右分割对比图组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/dataviz-comparison-split/src/DatavizComparisonSplit.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `DatavizComparisonSplit` and `datavizComparisonSplitDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Dataviz Comparison Split Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/dataviz-comparison-split to my project. Preserve the exported DatavizComparisonSplitProps API and register the DatavizComparisonSplit composition with the default props.
